src/main/java/com/test/catalog/infrastru._comment: A LIKE_CONTAINS filter over a single-property value object (SKU -> String(50)) is allowed: the VO flattens to one scalar column named after the field, so the JPQL LIKE is unambiguous. Guards the @dsl/contract validateRepositoryFilters relaxation (v0.3.1) end-to-end against real generator output.

contains: LOWER(p.name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', CAST(:search AS string), '%')) OR LOWER(CAST(p.sku AS string)) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', CAST(:search AS string), '%'))
